title: Meeting Prep Brief Agent
shortDescription: Pulls the matter file, researches every external attendee, and drafts the 1-page briefing 60 minutes before each meeting.

workflow.label: Meeting detected
workflow.detail: Calendar event matched to a matter

workflow.label: Flag open deadlines
workflow.detail: SOL, response dates, and holds noted

workflow.label: Deliver to inbox
workflow.detail: In your inbox 60 minutes before the meeting

seo.title: AI Meeting Prep Brief Agent for Law Firms | Dodonai
seo.description: Briefing on every external meeting attendee, the matter file pulled, the upcoming deadlines listed. Lands in Slack 60 minutes before the meeting starts.

hero.headline: AI Meeting Prep Brief Agent
hero.subheadline: 60 minutes before every external meeting, the briefing lands in your Slack: who you're meeting, what they care about, the matter context, the recent activity, and the questions worth opening with.
bullets: Attendee research (firm, role, recent matters, public statements)
Matter file context with the recent activity surfaced
Suggested opening questions and items to confirm
Delivered 60 minutes before the meeting starts

scenario.heading: The meeting you would have walked into cold
paragraphs: You have a 10am call with the claims adjuster on a matter you haven't touched in 3 weeks. In the old workflow, you spend the 8 minutes before the call skimming your notes and hoping you remember the open questions. The Meeting Prep Brief landed at 9: the claims adjuster's name, her authority limits, the offer history on this matter, the medical records that arrived last week, and 3 questions worth asking. You walk in informed, the call moves faster, and the offer that lands is one you can actually evaluate.

whatItDoes.heading: What the Meeting Prep Brief does
bullets: Watches your calendar for upcoming external meetings
Researches each external attendee from public sources (firm site, bar profile, recent published work)
Pulls the matter file and surfaces the most recent activity, last contact, and open items
Drafts 3 to 5 suggested opening questions or items to confirm
Delivers the briefing in Slack 60 minutes before the meeting starts

integrations: Practice management system for matter context
Document management system for recent filings and correspondence
Slack or Microsoft Teams for delivery

safety.heading: Safety posture
paragraphs: The briefing is informational and internal-only. The agent doesn't reach out to attendees, doesn't share data externally, and doesn't act on the matter. The research is from public sources; the matter context comes from your file.

faq.question: What about back-to-back meetings where 60 minutes of lead time isn't enough?
faq.answer: For days with packed external schedules, the agent can deliver a morning summary covering all the day's meetings at once, then individual reminders 15 minutes before each one. The cadence is configurable per attorney.

faq.question: Does it work for meetings where the attendees aren't on the calendar invite?
faq.answer: The agent uses the calendar entry as the starting point. For meetings where attendees are added late or not on the invite (a partner joining unexpectedly, a paralegal stepping in), the responsible attorney can ping the agent in Slack and get a fresh briefing in under a minute.
